title: Racing Scoreboard
description: A scoreboard for Ice boat racing servers like BoatLabs
body:
This mod replaces the vanilla scoreboard when it detects it is on an ice boat race.
The scoreboard has custom colors for players in 1st 2nd and 3rd and will animate swapping as players overtake eachover.

The sprites used in the mod can be replaced with a resource pack, resource pack makers should refer to the folder `/assets/racing_scoreboard/textures/gui` and [these texture files](https://gitlab.com/billyg270/racing-scoreboard/-/tree/master/src/main/resources/assets/racing_scoreboard/textures/gui?ref_type=heads).

Tested on BoatLabs and FrostHex.

please report issues via GitLab or Discord
